features.title: Private & Secure
features.desc: Files are deleted automatically after 1 hour.

features.desc: Most files processed in under 5 seconds.

features.title: 100% Free

common.mergeHint: Add at least 2 files to merge
common.pagesPlaceholder: e.g. 1-3, 5, 7-9 — leave empty for every page

merge-pdf.title: Merge PDF
merge-pdf.tagline: Combine multiple PDF files into one document.
merge-pdf.intro: Upload your PDF files, reorder them, and merge into a single document in seconds — no software installation needed.

faq.q: How many files can I merge?
faq.a: Free users can merge up to 2 files at once. Pro users get unlimited batch merging.

faq.q: Is the order preserved?
faq.a: Yes — you can reorder the files before merging, and the final PDF keeps that order.

faq.q: Is it free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no watermarks.

split-pdf.title: Split PDF
split-pdf.tagline: Split a PDF into separate files, one per page.
split-pdf.intro: Upload your PDF and click Split. Each page is saved as its own PDF file and bundled into a ZIP for download.

faq.q: How do I split a PDF into individual pages?
faq.a: Leave the pages field empty and click Split — every page becomes its own PDF, delivered as a ZIP.

faq.q: Can I split only specific pages?
faq.a: Yes. Enter a range like 1-3, 5, 7-9 and only those pages will be split into separate files.

faq.q: Is there a file size limit?
faq.a: Free users can split PDFs up to 10MB. Pro users get up to 100MB.

compress-pdf.title: Compress PDF
compress-pdf.tagline: Reduce PDF file size without losing quality.
compress-pdf.intro: Our compression removes redundant data and optimizes images while preserving readability. Most PDFs can be reduced by 30–70%.

faq.q: How much can I reduce a PDF file size?
faq.a: Typically 30–70% depending on content. PDFs with many images compress the most.

faq.q: Will compression affect the quality?
faq.a: We use lossless compression — text and vector graphics are not affected.

faq.q: What is the maximum file size?
faq.a: Free users: 10MB. Pro users: 100MB.

pdf-to-word.title: PDF to Word
pdf-to-word.tagline: Convert PDF to an editable Word document.
pdf-to-word.intro: Upload your PDF and we convert it to an editable .docx file. Text, tables, and basic formatting are preserved.

faq.q: Will the formatting be preserved?
faq.a: Basic formatting like headings, paragraphs, and tables are preserved. Complex layouts may need minor adjustments.

faq.q: Can I edit the Word document after conversion?
faq.a: Yes — the output is a fully editable .docx file compatible with Microsoft Word and Google Docs.

faq.q: Is there a file size limit?
faq.a: Free users can convert PDFs up to 10MB. Pro users get up to 100MB.

word-to-pdf.title: Word to PDF
word-to-pdf.tagline: Convert Word documents to PDF instantly.
word-to-pdf.intro: Upload your .doc or .docx file and we convert it to a professional PDF that looks exactly like your Word document.

faq.q: Does it support .doc and .docx?
faq.a: Yes, both older .doc and modern .docx formats are supported.

faq.q: Will fonts and images be preserved?
faq.a: Yes — the PDF output matches the Word document layout including fonts, images, and tables.

faq.q: Is it free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no watermarks.

rotate-pdf.title: Rotate PDF
rotate-pdf.tagline: Rotate all pages to the correct orientation.
rotate-pdf.intro: Upload your PDF, choose 90°, 180°, or 270° rotation, and download the corrected file instantly. All pages are rotated together.

faq.q: Can I rotate just one page?
faq.a: Currently all pages are rotated together. Per-page rotation is available on the Pro plan.

faq.q: Will rotating affect the PDF quality?
faq.a: No. Rotation is a metadata change — the content quality is not affected.

faq.q: Is it free to rotate PDF files?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no limits.

pdf-to-jpg.title: PDF to JPG
pdf-to-jpg.tagline: Convert each PDF page to a high-quality JPG image.
pdf-to-jpg.intro: Upload your PDF and we convert each page to a high-resolution JPG image. All pages are bundled into a ZIP file for easy download.

faq.q: What resolution are the JPG images?
faq.a: Images are exported at 150 DPI by default — high enough for screen and standard printing.

faq.q: Can I convert just one page?
faq.a: Upload a single-page PDF or use our Split PDF tool first to extract the page you need.

faq.q: Is it free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no watermarks on the images.

protect-pdf.title: Protect PDF
protect-pdf.tagline: Add a password to your PDF to prevent unauthorized access.
protect-pdf.intro: Upload your PDF, enter a password, and download the encrypted file. Only people with the password can open it.

faq.q: What encryption is used?
faq.a: 128-bit encryption — compatible with all PDF readers including Adobe Acrobat.

faq.q: Can I remove the password later?
faq.a: Yes — use a PDF unlock tool or our upcoming Unlock PDF feature.

faq.q: Is my file secure during upload?
faq.a: Files are processed in memory and deleted immediately after download.
